name: Leaseup
notes: All fields already populated in input.

name: Joinrefine
source: joinrefine.io contact page; search results confirming 247 Centre Street, 6th Floor, New York, NY 10013
notes: Refine is an AI-native product discovery/search engine. Address confirmed from search results.

name: Procurable
source: Tracxn, PitchBook, getlatka.com listing Los Angeles as HQ
notes: AI-powered should-cost modeling for manufacturing procurement. Founded 2023. One source said SF but multiple list Los Angeles.

name: Temboplus
source: CBInsights, ZoomInfo, GOV.UK company registry; multiple sources confirm Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
notes: HQ in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. Provides financial services APIs for neobanks and fintechs across Africa. Foreign company — city/state left null.

name: Secondcentury Ventures
source: Multiple sources including GlobeNewswire, scv.vc, Tracxn confirming 430 N Michigan Ave, Chicago IL 60611
notes: Backed by the National Association of REALTORS; focuses on real estate and proptech investments via REACH program.

name: Usesidecar
source: Tracxn, PitchBook, Wellfound listing San Francisco as HQ
notes: Sidecar AI — autonomous AI agents for logistics operations (email, TMS, ERP, carrier portals). Founded 2023/2024 by Akshat Khare and Sudhanshu Heda.

name: Hyperioncap
source: LinkedIn profile of founder Dillon Dunteman listing New York; LinkedIn post announcing firm
notes: Hyperion — deeptech-focused investment firm positioning as strategy partner for deeptech founders. Separate from Hyperion Capital Inc. (hyperioncap.com) and Hyperion Capital Partners.

name: Equal
source: ZoomInfo, Crunchbase, CBInsights all confirming 155 West 23rd Street, New York NY 10011
notes: Equal Ventures — seed-stage fund led by Richard Kerby and Rick Zullo, focusing on climate/energy, insurance, retail, supply chain.

name: Avid Ventures
source: ZoomInfo, Crunchbase, Tracxn all confirming 584 Broadway Suite 608, New York NY 10012
notes: Early-stage venture capital firm based in New York City.

name: Optimist
source: SEC ADV filing, PitchBook, Bloomberg confirming 33 West 17th Street, New York NY 10011
notes: Optimist Ventures — early-stage VC founded 2024, Flatiron District New York. Also has ties to Asheville NC startup ecosystem.

name: Montaukcap
source: Built In NYC listing, PitchBook, Crunchbase confirming New York, NY HQ
notes: Montauk Capital — venture studio and early-stage fund focused on the Electron Economy (electrified/intelligent technologies, energy transition). Founded 2023.

name: Nvpcap
source: GlobeNewswire, Crunchbase, PitchBook all confirming New York City HQ
notes: nvp capital — seed-stage VC ($200M AUM) backing vertical AI founders in healthcare, financial services, and industrials. Founded 2020 by Dan Borok and Vaughn Crowe.
